title: Expert Witness & Educational Psychologists | Psychology Direct
description: Access 1,000+ vetted psychologists and psychiatrists for expert witness reports, EHCP assessments, and specialist evaluations. Fast matching across the UK.

blocks.headline: The Right Psychologist, Matched in Hours
blocks.subtitle: Whether you need an expert witness for court or an Educational Psychologist for your school, we match you from 1,000+ vetted professionals — typically within 24 hours. Legal Aid rates always accepted.

blocks.heading: Two Services, One Platform
blocks.subheading: Expert witness psychology for legal professionals — and Educational Psychology for schools, local authorities, and families

cards.title: Expert Witness Services
cards.description: Psychologists and psychiatrists for family, criminal, civil, and immigration cases. HCPC/GMC registered, court-ready reports delivered on time.

cards.title: Educational Psychology
cards.description: EHCP assessments, SEND support, and specialist evaluations from experienced Educational Psychologists matched to your school or local authority.

cards.title: Join Our Network
cards.description: Psychologists and psychiatrists: register to access steady referrals, fair pay, admin support, and a collaborative professional community.

blocks.imageAlt: Psychology Direct's network of vetted professionals
blocks.heading: 1,000+ Vetted Professionals
blocks.bodyText: Every psychologist and psychiatrist in our network is HCPC or GMC registered, enhanced DBS checked, and professionally insured. We review sample reports before registration and quality-check every deliverable. You get the right professional — vetted, matched, and ready to work.

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Call 01306 879 975 or complete a brief online form. Tell us about your requirements — whether it's an expert witness report, EHCP assessment, or specialist evaluation.

steps.title: Receive Matched Professionals
steps.description: Within 24 hours, get 2–3 CVs with quotes from psychologists matched to your specialism, location, and timeline.

steps.title: We Handle Everything Else
steps.description: Once you instruct, we manage all admin — appointments, coordination, and scheduling. You focus on what matters.

steps.title: Quality-Checked Report Delivered
steps.description: Your report is 100% quality-checked for accuracy and compliance before delivery. Fast-track available when you need it.

blocks.imageAlt: A dedicated client manager discussing a referral
blocks.heading: Your Dedicated Client Manager
blocks.bodyText: One person owns your referral from first call to report delivery. They match your psychologist, manage the logistics, coordinate with all parties, and chase deadlines — so you never have to. It's a managed service, not a directory.

testimonials.quote: Staff are helpful and informative with a range of experts second to none. Reports are delivered securely and on time. They take the hard work out of locating relevant available experts.
testimonials.name: Brent Patterson
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: Speed and quality of response in identifying experts who could hit tight timeframes. A very helpful service.
testimonials.name: Tom Battarbee
testimonials.title: Solicitor

testimonials.quote: Psychology Direct provide Educational Psychologist services that are reliable, efficient, flexible, cost effective, proactive and totally empathetic to our needs.
testimonials.name: Stephen Higgins
testimonials.title: Principal EP

testimonials.quote: Deadlines needed to be met and it was extremely useful having services of a local expert. I would definitely use them in the future.
testimonials.name: Steve Harman
testimonials.title: Solicitor

blocks.heading: Not Sure Which Psychologist You Need?
blocks.bodyText: Different needs call for different specialisms. Our free 2-minute tool helps you work out whether you need a psychologist, a psychiatrist, or both — with clear, jargon-free explanations at each step.

blocks.heading: Does Your Case Need Expert Evidence?
blocks.bodyText: Not every case requires a psychological or psychiatric report. Answer a few quick questions and find out whether expert evidence would strengthen your case — and what type of expert you'd need.

blocks.heading: Ready to Get Started?
blocks.bodyText: Need a psychologist matched fast? Tell us your requirements and deadline. We'll match you with vetted professionals — no long admin delays, no guesswork.
